argument: The contested claim states that Sebastian Bosma is the Co-Founder & CEO of Skillset. However, the evidence presented indicates that Julaiti Alafate holds the title of Co-Founder & CTO at Skillset, while the CEO role appears unverified or may not exist as claimed, since no external or independent data confirms Bosma as CEO. Additionally, there is no Form D or any other formal announcements from Skillset that substantiate his claimed position. Moreover, given that Skillset is a very small team with only two founders, the absence of an established framework or role for a CEO, along with the reliance on a self-reported source, calls into question the accuracy of the statement as asserted. Even if Bosma were performing CEO-like duties informally, the claim's characterization of his title as "CEO" remains misleading and overstated.
